prompt: 我想在我的 Web 应用里实现多设备同时登录 Chat 的功能，从零开始引导我怎么做

assertions.text: Mentions console configuration or version requirements before jumping into code
Response is organized as numbered/named steps, not a single monolithic block
Provides TypeScript or JavaScript code examples for Web platform
Surfaces ALWAYS or NEVER best practice rules during the guide
Ends with or includes a verification/testing checklist
Includes a step specifically about handling onKickedOffline
